6:
Significance and visibility, popularity. Such people simply cannot go unnoticed — being a wallflower is not for them. They stand out in any company, they draw attention, others want to look at them and talk about them. Golden hands: the person has a gift for manual work — cooking, cosmetology, creative crafts, massage, anything done with the hands. 
A single digit 6 in the Psychomatrix means the person engages in physical work and creativity by mood, whenever the desire arises. These are pragmatic, material-minded people who can hold on to money and save it, though they can be a bit tight-fisted.
66:
Significance and visibility, popularity. Such people simply cannot go unnoticed — being a wallflower is not for them. They stand out in any company, they draw attention, others want to look at them and talk about them.
 They have great influence over people and possess a gift of persuasion. They need to be careful with their words (the power of their word is very strong — they can literally talk both good and bad into being). They have a gift for manual work, golden hands.
 Meticulous people, aesthetes. "66 or more" + "22 or more" — a doctor (surgeon) by the grace of God. "666 or more" — all the qualities inherent to "66", only manifested even more strongly.
666:
Significance and visibility, popularity. Such people simply cannot go unnoticed — being a wallflower is not for them. They stand out in any company, they draw attention, others want to look at them and talk about them. They have enormous influence over people and possess a gift of persuasion. They can sway large masses of people. A high level of diligence — this person is a true workhorse, with strong logical thinking. Regardless of whether the matrix holds 2s and 4s, there is great power in this person's words and actions. A person with 66/666 or more needs to develop spirituality and not become fixated on material wealth. 666 — patronage and philanthropy (they should give away a portion, for example a tithe); if there is a "5", they are not greedy and will always share, and they also make good judges; if there is a "4", then even more money will come to them. They should speak and think only good of people.
They need to be careful with their words (the power of their word is very strong — they can literally talk both good and bad into being).
 They see advantage everywhere and are very practical. 
These are very temperamental people who demand a lot of attention. If such a person also has many 1s, then they are authoritarian and try to impose their will on everyone. Talented marketers. 
If there are /6666 or more — sorcerers who carry their wealth away with them after death. In life they are long-livers who tend to have stomach problems. Their hands are spade-shaped (short fingers and broad palms). After the age of 37 there is a risk of losing everything, so in the second half of their life one should not do business with them. They are also called the "human case (container)" — they accumulate much knowledge but do not use it.

нет: There are no 6s in the Psychomatrix — this means the person is not inclined toward physical labor or housekeeping; they do not enjoy it and do it either out of necessity or out of a sense of duty toward another person. These are people of art and science. By nature the person is lazy and not drawn to painstaking work; they need to cultivate persistence and will only work if they like the work or there is a benefit in it. They are inclined to realize themselves on an intellectual path. The person is a slacker, and money does not stay with them. They may save on small things but lose on the big ones. (For money to accumulate, they need to build up their financial literacy.)
